title: Vagus Nerve Immunohistochemistry Protocol
author: J. Ashley Ezzell
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bwuwpexe
materials: biotinylated SP-conjugated Affinipure goat anti-rabbit antibody

steps.title: Bake slides with sections of paraffin-embedded...
steps.instruction: Bake slides with sections of paraffin-embedded vagus nerve overnight at 50oC and then cool overnight.

steps.title: Deparaffinize the slides and hydrate them to distilled water
steps.instruction: Deparaffinize the slides and hydrate them to distilled water: xylene (2x 6 min), 100% ethanol (5 min), 95% ethanol (4 min), 70% ethanol (3 min), deionized water (2x 1 min).

steps.title: Perform heat-induced epitope retrieval (HIER) at...
steps.instruction: Perform heat-induced epitope retrieval (HIER) at 120oC for 30 s followed by 90oC for 10 s, using a buffer with pH 6.0 (Thermo, TA-135-HBL).

steps.title: Cool for 20 min at room temperature
steps.instruction: Cool for 20 min at room temperature.

steps.title: Rinse in deionized water (2x 2 min)
steps.instruction: Rinse in deionized water (2x 2 min).

steps.title: Block with 3% H2O2 diluted in...
steps.instruction: Block with 3% H2O2 diluted in deionized water for 10 min.

steps.title: Rinse in deionized water (2x 2 min)
steps.instruction: Rinse in deionized water (2x 2 min).

steps.title: Rinse in Tris buffer (1x 2 min)
steps.instruction: Rinse in Tris buffer (1x 2 min).

steps.title: Block using DAKO Protein Block (X0909)...
steps.instruction: Block using DAKO Protein Block (X0909) for 10 min at room temperature.

steps.title: Apply the primary antibody (rabbit anti-tyrosine...
steps.instruction: Apply the primary antibody (rabbit anti-tyrosine hydroxylase, Abcam, ab112) diluted in Thermo Antibody Diluent to a concentration of 1:250, and incubate overnight at 4oC.

steps.title: Rinse in Tris Tween buffer (2x 2 min)
steps.instruction: Rinse in Tris Tween buffer (2x 2 min).

steps.title: Rinse in Tris buffer (1x 2 min)
steps.instruction: Rinse in Tris buffer (1x 2 min).

steps.title: Apply the secondary antibody (biotinylated SP-conjugated...
steps.instruction: Apply the secondary antibody (biotinylated SP-conjugated Affinipure goat anti-rabbit IgG (H+L), Jackson, 111-065-144) diluted in Thermo Antibody Diluent to a concentration of 1:500, and incubate for 1 hour at room temperature.

steps.title: Rinse in Tris Tween buffer (2x 2 min)
steps.instruction: Rinse in Tris Tween buffer (2x 2 min).

steps.title: Rinse in Tris buffer (1x 2 min)
steps.instruction: Rinse in Tris buffer (1x 2 min).

steps.title: Apply ABC Elite (Vector, PK-6100) at...
steps.instruction: Apply ABC Elite (Vector, PK-6100) at a concentration of 1:50 for 30 min at room temperature.

steps.title: Rinse in Tris Tween buffer (2x 2 min)
steps.instruction: Rinse in Tris Tween buffer (2x 2 min).

steps.title: Rinse in Tris buffer (1x 2 min)
steps.instruction: Rinse in Tris buffer (1x 2 min).

steps.title: Apply DAB chromogen (Thermo, TA-125-QHDX) for...
steps.instruction: Apply DAB chromogen (Thermo, TA-125-QHDX) for 3 min at room temperature.

steps.title: Rinse in deionized water (2x 2 min)
steps.instruction: Rinse in deionized water (2x 2 min).

steps.title: Counterstain using hematoxylin
steps.instruction: Counterstain using hematoxylin.

steps.title: Dehydrate, clear, and coverslip using DPX mountant
steps.instruction: Dehydrate, clear, and coverslip using DPX mountant.

steps.title: Each sample was imaged at 20x...
steps.instruction: Each sample was imaged at 20x using a Nikon Ti2 microscope with a DS-Ri2 color CMOS camera (Nikon Instruments Inc.). We selected the best of four slices for each sample based on the quality of the slice (no tearing or fraying).
